subject: Gaming
title: Daigo Umehara: The Beast of Fighting Games
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Daigo Umehara: The Beast of Fighting Games.

hook.text: Daigo Umehara parried 15 consecutive hits with one pixel of health. It's the most famous esports moment.

buildup.text: At EVO 2004, Daigo faced Justin Wong in Street Fighter III. He was nearly dead with no chance left.

discovery.text: Daigo parried every hit of Chun-Li's super—requiring frame-perfect timing 15 times in a row.

twist.text: The crowd erupted. The clip became YouTube's most iconic gaming moment and introduced millions to esports.

climax.text: Moment 37 proved that esports could produce highlight-reel drama rivaling any traditional sport.

punchline.text: One pixel of health. Fifteen perfect parries. Esports' greatest moment.

quiz.question: What happened during the famous EVO Moment 37?
options: Daigo parried 15 consecutive hits with one pixel of health remaining
A player won with a perfect score
